## RecipeId type

Globally unique recipe identifier (composite) Format: "sourceId.baseRecipeId" Must contain exactly one dot separator Pattern: /^\[a-zA-Z0-9\_-\]+<!-- -->.<!-- -->\[a-zA-Z0-9\_-\]+$/

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type RecipeId = Brand<string, 'RecipeId'>;
```
